title: taraxacum oppidanum
intro: Taraxacum oppidanum, also known as the urban dandelion or town dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid digestion and relieve liver and kidney issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum oppidanum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve immune function, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum oppidanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
